findings.issue: File sharing service is reachable from client segment
Gateway web administration interface is visible
Printer web panel is visible to the sample client

remediation.title: Restrict Demo NAS file sharing exposure
remediation.retest: Run authorized low-intensity service exposure check from the sample client.

remediation.title: Move gateway administration to a management-only path
remediation.retest: Confirm web administration is not visible from the sample client segment.

remediation.title: Review printer web panel visibility
remediation.retest: Confirm only approved administration hosts can reach the printer panel.

rawEvidence: Demo fixture only. No production network data is included.
Reserved documentation addresses are used for every asset.
MAC addresses, local usernames, and device identifiers are intentionally redacted.
